title: Persistence
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}{{IndividualShip|image=|name=''Persistence''|designer=|manufacturer=|line=|model=[[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]]<ref name="EaW">''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''</ref>|type=|cost=|modifier=|sysmods=|length=300 [[meter]]s<ref name="SWTJ3">''[[Star Wars Technical Journal of the Rebel Forces]]''</ref>|width=|height=|mass=|max accel=|mglt=|max speed=|maneuverability=|engine=|hyperdrive=|hdrange=|hdsystem=|poweroutput=|power=|shield gen=|hull=|sensor=|target=|navigation=|avionics=|maincomp=|countermeasures=|armament=|complement=|bays=|escapepods=|crew=|skeleton=|passengers=|capacity=|cargohandling=|consumables=|lifesupport=|communications=|othersystems=|role=[[Frigate/Legends|Frigate]]<ref name="EaW" />|commission=|destroyed=|retired=|battles=|affiliation=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]<ref name="EaW" />|navy=[[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]]<ref name="EaW" />|fleet=|owners=|captains=|crewmembers=|registry=|aliases=}}The '''''Persistence''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] which saw service in the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Alliance Fleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="EaW" />

*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
